infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Mutawwif needs your location to guide you through Tawaf, Sa'i, and Miqat crossing.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Mutawwif uses background location to track Miqat crossing and zone entry/exit.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Mutawwif uses background location to track your pilgrimage progress.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Mutawwif uses the camera to scan your Nusuk permit QR code and photograph your hotel card.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Mutawwif may use the microphone for voice input.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Mutawwif accesses photos to display your hotel card.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Mutawwif needs location to guide your pilgrimage.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Mutawwif uses background location for Miqat tracking.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Mutawwif needs location for zone detection.

plugins.cameraPermission: Mutawwif uses the camera to scan your Nusuk QR code.

plugins.photosPermission: Mutawwif accesses photos to display your hotel card.
